title: neuroloma pulvinatum
intro: Neuroloma pulvinatum, also known as the pulvinate neuroloma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant that obtains its nutrients by attaching itself to the roots of other plants, typically legumes. The medicinal properties of Neuroloma pulvinatum include its potential use as a diuretic and to treat various gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of the plant may include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of urinary tract infections, and it can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
